name: Japanese Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cucumber, peeled and sliced into rounds
1 Japanese tomato, sliced in quarters (or substitute Roma tomato)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dressing ingredients well. Refrigerate up to 1 hour before using.
2. Steam the broccoli and snow peas until they have turned a bright, vivid green (about 8 minutes). They should still have a crunch to them. Run under cold water to stop the cooking process.
3. Toss all the vegetables in a large bowl. Spoon miso dressing on top and toss well. Salad will keep up to 24 hours in the refrigerator.
Notes:
A Japanese tomato looks like a large, deep red Roma tomato with a greyish blush to the skin. It is in season only a short time in the summer and can likely be found at your local farmers' market.
